title: Navigate from Home to Create Room page
description: Verifies the Create Room button on the Home page routes to the Create Room page.

title: Navigate from Home to Join Room page
description: Verifies the Join Room button on the Home page routes to the Join Room page.

title: Toggle language on Home updates visible UI text
description: Verifies that toggling the language on the Home page updates visible UI language.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Verify text "Create Room" is not visible
Verify text "สร้างห้อง" is visible

title: Language toggle persists when navigating to Join Room
description: Verifies the selected language remains applied after navigating from Home to Join Room.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Verify text "สร้างห้อง" is visible
Verify text "รหัสห้อง" is visible

title: Home shows Create and Join actions on initial load
description: Verifies the Home page loads and shows primary navigation actions without requiring authentication.

title: Login with valid username/password shows logged-in state in header
description: Verifies a user can log in with correct credentials and sees the username button in the header.

steps.description: Fill "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username input field
Fill "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click Login button to submit credentials
Verify element "username button" is visible in the header

title: Login with invalid username/password shows an error message
description: Verifies the login form shows a visible error message when credentials are invalid.

steps.description: Fill "nonexistent_user_12345" into the username input field
Fill "wrong_password_!@#" into the password input field
Click Login button to submit credentials

title: Register a new account with username/password shows logged-in state
description: Verifies a new user can switch to Register mode, register successfully, and see the username button in the header.

steps.description: Click toggle to switch to Register mode
Fill "new_user_test_2026_03_22" into the username input field
Fill "P@ssw0rd_Test_2026" into the password input field
Click Register button to create a new account
Verify element "username button" is visible in the header

title: Toggle language between Thai and English updates the login page text
description: Verifies the language toggle changes visible UI text on the login page.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Toggle language between Thai and English
Verify text "เข้าสู่ระบบ" is visible

title: Back button returns from Login page to Home page
description: Verifies the back button on the login page returns the user to the Home page.

steps.description: Click back button to return to home

title: Register mode can be opened and shows Register button
description: Verifies switching to Register mode changes the primary submit button to Register.

steps.description: Click toggle to switch to Register mode

title: Login mode is available and shows Login button
description: Verifies the login page shows Login mode with a visible Login button by default.

steps.description: Verify element "username input field" is visible
Verify element "password input field" is visible

title: Create room lobby shows an auto-generated room code
description: Verifies that the Create Room lobby loads and displays a room code for sharing.

steps.description: Verify element "room code value" is visible

title: Role controls and total role count display are visible
description: Verifies that role +/- controls and the total role count vs player count indicator are present in the lobby UI.

steps.description: Verify element "Start Game" button is visible

title: Start Game is blocked when requirements are not met (role count mismatch / insufficient players)
description: Verifies that attempting to start the game without meeting conditions results in a visible error message (or clearly blocked start).

steps.description: Adjust role counts using the +/- buttons so the total role count is clearly different from the player count shown

title: Back button returns to Home from Create Room
description: Verifies that the user can leave the lobby and return to the Home page using the back button in the UI.

title: Language toggle switches lobby UI language
description: Verifies that toggling language changes visible UI text in the Create Room lobby.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Toggle language between Thai and English
Verify text "Room Code" is not visible

title: Join Room page loads and accepts valid-looking room code and player name
description: Verifies the Join Room screen allows entering a 4-digit code and a player name, and the Join action is available.

steps.description: Type "1234" into the room code input field
Type "PlayerOne" into the player name input field
Verify either an error message is visible or the URL contains "/play/"

title: Room not found shows an error message
description: Verifies an invalid/non-existent room code shows a room-not-found error after attempting to join.

steps.description: Type "0000" into the room code input field
Type "NoRoomUser" into the player name input field

title: Joining blocked after game started shows an error message
description: Verifies the UI displays an error when trying to join a room where the game has already started and joining is blocked.

steps.description: Type "9999" into the room code input field
Type "LateJoiner" into the player name input field

title: Back button returns to Home page
description: Verifies the Back action from Join Room returns the user to the Home page route.

title: Room code input rejects non-numeric characters
description: Verifies the room code field behaves like a numeric input and does not accept letters.

steps.description: Type "ABCD" into the room code input field
Type "12AB" into the room code input field

title: Room code length is limited to 4 digits
description: Verifies the room code field does not allow more than 4 digits to be entered.

steps.description: Type "12345" into the room code input field
Type "6789" into the room code input field

title: Player name length is limited to 20 characters
description: Verifies the player name field enforces the 20-character limit or prevents longer names from being fully entered.

steps.description: Type "1234" into the room code input field
Type "ThisNameIsWayTooLongOverTwenty" into the player name input field

title: Missing required fields prevents join or shows validation message
description: Verifies attempting to join with missing room code or missing player name is blocked or shows a visible validation/error message.

steps.description: Verify an error message is visible
Type "1234" into the room code input field
Verify an error message is visible

title: Language toggle switches Join Room text between English and Thai
description: Verifies the language toggle updates visible UI text on the Join Room page.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Toggle language between Thai and English

title: Moderator view shows player list and assigned roles
description: Verifies the moderator dashboard loads and displays a visible player list with role information for each player.

title: Start Night begins night phase and shows sub-phase progression labels
description: Verifies starting night updates the UI to night state and shows the expected night sub-phase progression indicators.

title: Resolve Night blocked when actions are not submitted
description: Verifies resolving night too early shows an error message that resolution cannot proceed yet.

title: End Game closes the room from the moderator dashboard
description: Verifies the moderator can end the game/close the room and sees a visible ended/closed state or is returned to a non-moderator screen.

title: View overall stats and per-role breakdown on Profile page (authenticated)
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Profile and see overall and per-role statistics.

title: Profile page shows win rate and role stats section (authenticated)
description: Verifies win rate and a per-role stats section are visible to an authenticated user.

title: Logout from Profile redirects to Login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out from Profile and is sent back to the Login page.

title: Back button on Profile returns to Home
description: Verifies the Profile back button takes the user to the Home page.

title: Toggle language on Profile updates UI text
description: Verifies the language toggle on Profile changes visible UI language between English and Thai.

steps.description: Toggle language between Thai and English
Verify that either Thai text is visible on the page or English text is visible on the page (indicating the language changed)
Verify the Profile page still shows the stats section after the language change

title: Profile shows an error state when stats fail to load
description: Verifies the Profile page displays an error message when user stats cannot be loaded.

steps.description: Wait for the Profile stats area to finish loading
Verify text indicating stats could not be loaded is visible
Verify an error-related text such as "Error" or "Failed" is visible

title: Home page shows username button when user is logged in
description: Verifies that after logging in, the Home page auth bar shows the username button instead of the Login button.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Verify text "{{LOGIN_USER}}" is visible in the header
Verify element "Login" button is not visible

title: Unauthenticated access to /profile redirects to /login
description: Verifies that visiting /profile without being logged in redirects the user to the Login page.

steps.description: Clear localStorage to ensure no auth token exists

title: Login button is disabled when username or password is empty
description: Verifies the Login submit button is disabled (not clickable) when either the username or password field is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login with a full page reload to reset all form state
Verify text "Login" is visible confirming the page is in Login mode (not Register mode)
Verify the Login submit button is disabled when both username and password fields are empty
Type "someuser" into the username input field
Verify the Login submit button is still disabled when only username is filled and password is empty
Type "somepassword" into the password input field
Verify the Login submit button is still disabled when only password is filled and username is empty

title: Registering with an already-taken username shows an error
description: Verifies that attempting to register with a username that already exists shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Click toggle to switch to Register mode
Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username input field
Type "AnyPassword123" into the password input field
Verify an error message is visible
Verify text indicating username is taken or already exists is visible

title: Create room shows room code and copy button after socket connects
description: Verifies that navigating to /create successfully creates a room, displays a 4-digit room code, and shows a functional copy button.

steps.description: Verify a 4-digit numeric room code is visible on the page
Click the copy button next to the room code
Verify a confirmation indicator such as a checkmark or 'Copied' text is visible

title: Werewolf role count cannot be decreased below 1
description: Verifies that the minus button for the Werewolf role is disabled or has no effect when the count is already at 1 (minimum).

steps.description: Verify the Werewolf role counter is visible
Click the minus button for Werewolf multiple times until it cannot decrease further
Verify the Werewolf count shows 1 and does not go below 1

title: Non-werewolf role counts can be decreased to 0
description: Verifies that Seer, Bodyguard, and Villager role counts can be decremented to 0 using the minus button.

steps.description: Click the minus button for Seer multiple times until it cannot decrease further
Click the minus button for Bodyguard multiple times until it cannot decrease further

title: Player view shows waiting state before game starts
description: Verifies that a player who joins a room sees a waiting screen before the moderator starts the game.

steps.description: Navigate to /create to get a room code
Verify a 4-digit room code is visible
Type the noted room code into the room code input field
Type "TestPlayer" into the player name input field
Verify a waiting or lobby state message is visible

title: Home page shows Login button when user is not authenticated
description: Verifies that when no user is logged in, the Home page auth bar shows the Login button.

steps.description: Clear localStorage to ensure no auth token exists
Verify no username button is visible in the auth bar

title: Player count updates in lobby when a player joins
description: Verifies the Create Room lobby updates the player list in real time when a player joins using the room code.

steps.description: Verify text "Players (0)" or similar empty state is visible
Open /join in a new tab, enter the noted room code and name "Alice", then click Join
Verify text "Alice" is visible in the player list on the Create Room page
Verify text "Players (1)" or similar count showing 1 player is visible
